description: Basal-state transcriptome TPM table; reference for cross-fill of missing genes in experimental data (Tier 1 in RFC-010 framework). M9 glucose minus AAs is vEcoli's default basal condition.
Experimental TPM data; the swap point for variant runs (Tier 2 in RFC-010 framework). Defaults to the basal reference; cross-fill is a no-op when not swapped.
